name: Fresh Apple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Sift the flour and baking soda together in a medium mixing bowl.
In a large bowl, cream butter, brown sugar, salt, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and egg.
Add half the flour to the butter mixture and blend well.
Mix in half the juice or milk.
Add apples, nuts, and raisins to the remaining flour.
Add the apple mixture to the butter mixture. Mix in the remaining juice or milk.
Drop dough by teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets.
Bake for 8 to 9 minutes, or until cookies are firm.
While cookies are warm, spread with vanilla glaze.
Glaze:
1 cup Confectioner's sugar
1 tablespoon Butter; softened
1/4 teaspoon Vanilla
1/4 teaspoon Salt
1 1/2 tablespoons Milk or light cream
Blend all ingredients together in a mixing bowl and mix until smooth.
